---
title: "Local Open Science Initiatives"
pagetitle: "Local Open Science Initiatives"
anchor-sections: false
format: 
  html:
    css: styles.css
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<p class="lead mt-3">The LMU Open Science Center members and fellows organize the following grassroots initiatives.</p>
<div class="container mt-5">
  <div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-md-2 row-cols-lg-3 g-4">
    <div class="col">
        <div class="card initiative-card h-100 shadow-sm rounded">
            <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column">
                <div class='d-flex flex-row flex-wrap align-items-center gap-3 mb-2'>
                    <div class="initiative-img">
                      <img src="images/osim.png" alt="OSIM logo">
                    </div>
                    <h5 class="card-title mb-0" style="color: var(--osc-accent);">OSIM</h5>
                </div>
                <p class="card-text flex-grow-1">Open Science Initiative in Medicine</p>
                <a href="local-os-initiatives/osim.qmd" class="btn btn-primary mt-auto align-self-start" aria-label="Learn more about OSIM">Learn More</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="col">
        <div class="card initiative-card h-100 shadow-sm rounded">
            <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column">
                <div class='d-flex flex-row flex-wrap align-items-center gap-3 mb-2'>
                    <div class="initiative-img">
                      <img src="images/osis.png" alt="OSIS logo">
                    </div>
                    <h5 class="card-title mb-0" style="color: var(--osc-accent);">OSIS</h5>
                </div>
                <p class="card-text flex-grow-1">Open Science Initiative in Social Sciences</p>
                <a href="local-os-initiatives/osis.qmd" class="btn btn-primary mt-auto align-self-start" aria-label="Learn more about OSIS">Learn More</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="col">
        <div class="card initiative-card h-100 shadow-sm rounded">
            <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column">
                <div class='d-flex flex-row flex-wrap align-items-center gap-3 mb-2'>
                    <div class="initiative-img">
                      <img src="images/osip.png" alt="OSIP logo">
                    </div>
                    <h5 class="card-title mb-0" style="color: var(--osc-accent);">OSIP</h5>
                </div>
                <p class="card-text flex-grow-1">Open Science Initiative in Psychology</p>
                <a href="local-os-initiatives/osip.qmd" class="btn btn-primary mt-auto align-self-start" aria-label="Learn more about OSIP">Learn More</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="col">
        <div class="card initiative-card h-100 shadow-sm rounded">
            <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column">
                <div class='d-flex flex-row flex-wrap align-items-center gap-3 mb-2'>
                    <div class="initiative-img">
                      <img src="images/reproducibilitea.jpeg" alt="ReproducibiliTea logo">
                    </div>
                    <h5 class="card-title mb-0" style="color: var(--osc-accent);">ReproducibiliTea</h5>
                </div>
            <p class="card-text flex-grow-1">A journal club for open and reproducible science.</p>
            <a href="local-os-initiatives/reproducibilitea.qmd" class="btn btn-primary mt-auto align-self-start" aria-label="Learn more about ReproducibiliTea">Learn More</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="col">
        <div class="card initiative-card h-100 shadow-sm rounded">
            <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column">
                <div class='d-flex flex-row flex-wrap align-items-center gap-3 mb-2'>
                    <div class="initiative-img">
                      <img src="images/hackyhour.svg" alt="Hacky Hour logo">
                    </div>
                    <h5 class="card-title mb-0" style="color: var(--osc-accent);">Hacky Hour</h5>
                </div>
                <p class="card-text flex-grow-1">Informal meetups for coding, data, and research tools.</p>
                <a href="local-os-initiatives/hacky-hour.qmd" class="btn btn-primary mt-auto align-self-start" aria-label="Learn more about Hacky Hour">Learn More</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="col">
        <div class="card initiative-card h-100 shadow-sm rounded">
            <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column">
                <div class='d-flex flex-row flex-wrap align-items-center gap-3 mb-2'>
                  <div class="initiative-img">
                    <img src="images/rse.png" alt="Munich RSE logo">
                  </div>
                  <h5 class="card-title mb-0" style="color: var(--osc-accent);">Munich RSE</h5>
                </div>
                <p class="card-text flex-grow-1">Group supporting high-quality research software development.</p>
                <a href="local-os-initiatives/munich-rse.qmd" class="btn btn-primary mt-auto align-self-start" aria-label="Learn more about Munich RSE">Learn More</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

```
